Name: departments_aggregate
SQL: WITH "_root.base" AS MATERIALIZED (SELECT * FROM "public"."departments") SELECT json_build_object('__typename', 'departments_aggregate', 'aggregate', (SELECT json_build_object('__typename', 'departments_aggregate_fields', 'count', COUNT(*), 'sum', json_build_object('budget', SUM("budget"), '__typename', 'departments_sum_fields')) FROM "_root.base")) AS "departments_aggregate"
